question:
[Previous Feedback] Correct!

Please create a code review checklist document for Sprint 10 in Markdown format, save to day26/. Include sections for: code quality criteria, security checks, performance considerations, and documentation requirements. Add the review criteria as checkboxes.

content.text:
[Tue 2026-03-17 04:37 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Correct!

Please create a code review checklist document for Sprint 10 in Markdown format, save to day26/. Include sections for: code quality criteria, security checks, performance considerations, and documentation requirements. Add the review criteria as checkboxes.

arguments.content:
---
meta:
  created_at: "2026-03-17T16:37:47+08:00"
  author: "MetaClaw Agent"
  status: "done"
  sprint: 10
---

# Sprint 10 Code Review Checklist

## Code quality criteria
- [ ] Code is readable (clear naming, small functions, minimal nesting)
- [ ] No duplicated logic; shared behavior extracted appropriately
- [ ] Error handling is explicit and consistent (no swallowed exceptions)
- [ ] Input validation exists at boundaries (API, CLI, job handlers)
- [ ] Logging is appropriate (useful context, no sensitive data)
- [ ] Tests cover core logic and edge cases
- [ ] No dead code, commented-out blocks, or debug prints

## Security checks
- [ ] Authentication/authorization enforced for protected operations
- [ ] No secrets committed (keys/tokens/passwords); config uses env/secret manager
- [ ] Inputs are sanitized/validated to prevent injection (SQL/NoSQL/template)
- [ ] Sensitive data is not logged (PII, credentials, tokens)
- [ ] Dependency changes reviewed (known CVEs, pinned versions)
- [ ] Proper use of TLS/HTTPS for outbound calls

## Performance considerations
- [ ] N+1 queries avoided; DB access is efficient
- [ ] Pagination/limits in place for list endpoints
- [ ] Expensive operations cached or batched where appropriate
- [ ] Timeouts set for outbound calls; retries are bounded
- [ ] Large payloads/loops have reasonable complexity and memory use

## Documentation requirements
- [ ] Public APIs include clear request/response examples
- [ ] Non-obvious decisions are documented (README/design notes/comments)
- [ ] Config changes documented (default values, migration steps)
- [ ] New modules include required metadata (P2 filename, P3 Meta, P1 time fields)
- [ ] Operational notes included (how to run, env vars, expected outputs)

arguments.command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('day26/20260420_code_review_checklist.md')
text=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
assert '## Code quality criteria' in text
assert '- [ ]' in text
print('OK')
PY

cat >> done.log <<'EOF'
[DONE] 2026-04-20T16:37:47+08:00 | code_review_checklist | Created Sprint 10 code review checklist markdown document
EOF

content.text:
Created `day26/20260420_code_review_checklist.md` with sections for:

- Code quality criteria
- Security checks
- Performance considerations
- Documentation requirements

All criteria are included as Markdown checkboxes. Also appended the 6th `done.log` entry (`task_id: code_review_checklist`).
